text.title: Voice Implementation Failure Modes
text.summary: 4 antipatterns from voice-agent post-mortems. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Voice agent triggers on background noise (HVAC fan, keyboard, music). User frustrated, transcripts full of nonsense.
antipattern.root-cause: Energy/RMS VAD has no notion of speech vs noise; any signal above threshold fires.
antipattern.fix: Replace with Silero VAD (`torch.hub.load('snakers4/silero-vad', 'silero_vad')`) or WebRTC VAD (`webrtcvad.Vad(3)`). Both use learned speech models.

antipattern.symptom: Tool calls return coroutine objects instead of values; LLM sees `<coroutine>` as the tool result and hallucinates around it.
antipattern.root-cause: Author registered `async def` tools in the sync tool dispatcher without awaiting them.
antipattern.fix: Either: keep tools sync and offload via `asyncio.to_thread(tool_fn, *args)`; OR: switch to a fully async tool dispatcher that awaits each call.

antipattern.symptom: On-call paged for every browser tab closure; real errors swallowed silently.
antipattern.root-cause: `except Exception` catches both `WebSocketDisconnect` (expected) and runtime errors (unexpected) — logs and alerting cannot distinguish them.
antipattern.fix: Catch `WebSocketDisconnect` first with a debug-level log; let other `Exception` propagate or log at error level with traceback.

antipattern.symptom: TTS reads "asterisk asterisk hello asterisk asterisk world" instead of "hello world".
antipattern.root-cause: Author piped LLM markdown output to TTS without stripping.
antipattern.fix: Strip with `re.sub(r'[*_`#>]', '', text)` and optionally `re.sub(r'\[(.*?)\]\(.*?\)', r'\1', text)` for links before TTS synthesis.
